text: The Aster Flow Legging is a high-rise, compressive legging in a four-way stretch fabric that holds you in without digging. It is squat-proof and stays put through studio classes, yoga, and easy runs. Priced at 98 dollars in black. It runs small, so most people size up one.

The Aster Vent Tech Tee is a featherlight, breathable running and training tee with mesh vents at the back and a moisture-wicking finish that dries fast. It is built for hot workouts like hot yoga, spin, and summer runs. 78 dollars in slate.

The Aster Daytrip Belt Bag is a compact, hands-free crossbody that fits a phone, cards, and keys. Water-resistant shell, adjustable strap. Good for travel days, festivals, and errands. 38 dollars in black.

The Aster Cloud Hoodie is a soft brushed-fleece hoodie with an oversized, relaxed fit for lounging and layering over a tee on cool days. Some reviewers find it snug in the shoulders, so size up if you are between sizes. 118 dollars in heather grey.

The Aster Storm Shell Jacket is a fully waterproof, seam-sealed rain shell with a 20k waterproof rating, pit zips, and an adjustable hood. It packs into its own pocket. This is the piece for wet-weather cities like Vancouver and Seattle: rainy commutes, dog walks, and shoulder-season hikes. 178 dollars in storm blue, sizes S to L.

The Aster Trailhead Puffer is a warm, packable insulated jacket with recycled down-alternative fill, rated for cold and dry winter days. It layers under the Storm Shell when it is both cold and wet. Great for winter commutes, travel, and the cold. 228 dollars in black, sizes M and L.

The Aster Base Merino Long Sleeve is a fine-gauge merino wool base layer that regulates temperature, resists odor, and works warm or cool. It is the ideal travel and layering piece: wear it alone in spring or under a shell in winter. 88 dollars in oatmeal.
The Aster Studio Sports Bra is a high-support, high-impact bra with a moisture-wicking liner and removable pads. Built for running, HIIT, and hot yoga. 58 dollars in black.
The Aster Momentum Short is a lined 5-inch running short with a secure zip pocket and a soft waistband. Quick-drying, chafe-free, made for runs and gym sessions in warm weather. 68 dollars in black.
The Aster Everywhere Jogger is a soft, tapered jogger in a wrinkle-resistant travel knit. Comfortable enough to lounge, sharp enough to travel and run errands in. 108 dollars in charcoal.

The Aster Commute Tote is a structured work tote with a padded 16-inch laptop sleeve, a water-resistant base, and a trolley strap for travel. Built for the commute and the office. 128 dollars in black.
The Aster Peak Beanie is a soft merino-blend beanie that holds warmth without itch. A simple layer for cold mornings, commutes, and winter walks. 38 dollars in charcoal.

La veste impermeable Aster Storm Shell est une coque de pluie a coutures etancheifiees, avec capuche ajustable, ideale pour les villes pluvieuses comme Vancouver. Parfaite pour les trajets sous la pluie. 178 dollars en bleu orage, tailles S a L.
Le sous-vetement Aster Base en laine merinos regule la temperature et resiste aux odeurs. C'est la piece ideale pour voyager et pour superposer les couches en hiver. 88 dollars en avoine.
